metadata.description: Write, review, and refactor idiomatic Clojure — data-first, immutable by default, built from small pure functions, and developed live at the REPL

plugins.name: clojure-idiomatic
plugins.description: Idiomatic Clojure skill: threading macros, persistent data structures, REPL-driven development, core.async, transducers, multimethods, and protocols
